cb_step_1.title: Choose Pelvic Volume
cb_step_1.instruction: Select the Pelvic Volume from the 'Input CT Volume' dropdown.

cb_step_4.title: Exclude Fragments
cb_step_4.instruction: Untick fragments to exclude from planning.

cb_step_7.title: Adjust Fragment?
cb_step_7.instruction: Choose Yes to manually adjust a fragment.

cb_step_8.title: Select Fragment
cb_step_8.instruction: Choose a fragment from the 'Fragment' dropdown.

cb_step_9.title: Adjust Fragment
cb_step_9.instruction: Move and rotate the selected fragment in the 3D view.

cb_step_12.title: Edit Screw Trajectories?
cb_step_12.instruction: Choose Yes to edit screw trajectories.

cb_step_13.title: Adjust Screw Trajectories
cb_step_13.instruction: Move and rotate the screw trajectories in the 3D view.

cb_step_14.title: Regenerate Screws
cb_step_14.instruction: Click 'Regenerate screw from edited lines' button.

operation_descriptions: Generate reduction template from pelvis segmentation
Manually adjust the position and rotation of the selected fragment.
Manually adjust the position and rotation of the screw trajectories.
Regenerate screw models from edited trajectories

ground_api_evidence_note: ground_api_evidence is pre-revision retrieval evidence; final_api_evidence reflects the current validated templates.
